data.title: Remove tags and filtering from Lab/Writing page

data.body: Remove tag chips and filter UI from Lab/Writing index page. Keep underlying data model so filtering can return later. MVP v0 cleanup.

SCOPE EXPANDED (2026-04-14): single 'Writing page v0 cleanup' task covering (a) remove tags + filter UI, (b) remove per-author publication pages (Andrew, Ivan), (c) remove Ivan's posts entirely, (d) remove banners. Keep code/data for later restore where possible. Absorbs FRAC-170, FRAC-171, FRAC-173. Separate from FRAC-172 (multi-author schema) and FRAC-174 (content ingestion).

SCOPE CORRECTION (2026-04-14): banner removal moved OUT of this task. Julianna clarified banners are on the home page (below the hero), not the Writing page. This task now covers (a) remove tags + filter UI on Writing, (b) remove per-author publication pages, (c) remove Ivan's posts. Home-page banners absorbed into FRAC-161.
